asset.title: Ask Agent
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough clearly demonstrates using the NodeAgent to reconcile spreadsheet variances via chat commands, showing real-time cell updates and execution traces.

featureClarity.evidence: Demonstrates typing a command to reconcile variance cells and seeing the agent execute it.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the complete flow from command input to agent execution, cell locking, and final trace updates.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-themed UI layout, though the interface is dense with multiple panels.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with NodeRoom's core concepts of spreadsheets, chat-based agents, and audit traces.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic screen recording showing actual UI interactions and live state changes.

legibility.evidence: Small font sizes in the spreadsheet cells and chat input may limit readability on smaller screens.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for financial analysts and operations teams automating reconciliation tasks.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the step-by-step execution, cell-locking mechanism, and trace logs.

observedEvidence: Chat input panel with /ask command execution
Spreadsheet component showing Q3 variance data
NodeAgent status updates and cell-locking visual indicators
Versioned spreadsheet sync trace updating in real-time

defects.observed: Spreadsheet cell values and chat text are small and may be difficult to read at default README resolution.
defects.fix: Slightly increase browser zoom level during recording to enhance text legibility.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Ask the Room NodeAgent to reconcile spreadsheet variances directly from the chat, featuring real-time cell locking and auditable execution traces.
